title: Verify user can toggle a field from read-only to editable and save changes

steps.expected: The record's Name field is displayed in read-only mode

steps.action: Click the Edit button next to the Name field
steps.expected: The Name field becomes editable and the Edit button becomes a Save button

steps.action: Edit the Name field's value and click Save
steps.expected: The Name field returns to read-only mode displaying the updated value
